products.name: LSM-MICRO
products.descriptor: Micro mil-spec capacitive fuel/oil level sensor for UAV platforms, up to 300 mm, IP68

evidence.snippet:
Micro Mil-Spec Liquid Level Sensor
----------------------------------
Ultra-lightweight capacitive fuel level sensor with a small footprint, designed for mil-spec UAV platforms. Available in custom sizes up to 300mm.

products.name: LSM100-MICRO
products.descriptor: Micro mil-spec 1-bolt capacitive liquid level sensor for UAV platforms, up to 300 mm, IP68

evidence.snippet:
Micro Mil-Spec 1-Bolt Liquid Level Sensor
-----------------------------------------
Ultra-lightweight, compact capacitive liquid level sensor with a 1-bolt mounting format well-suited for mil-spec UAV platforms. Available in custom sizes up to 300mm.

products.name: LSM200
products.descriptor: Mil-spec 2-bolt capacitive fuel/oil level sensor for defence UAV, up to 450 mm, IP68

evidence.snippet:
Mil-Spec UAV 2-Bolt Coolant Level Sensor
----------------------------------------
A robust capacitive liquid level sensor with a 2-bolt fixing for fuel and oil measurement in rugged defence UAV applications. Resistant to shock and extreme temperatures, this mil-spec instrument is custom-built up to 450mm long.

products.name: LSM200-38999
products.descriptor: Mil-spec 2-bolt capacitive fuel/oil level sensor with MIL-DTL-38999 connector for defence UAV, up to 450 mm

evidence.snippet:
Mil-Spec UAV 2-Bolt Fuel & Oil Level Sensor
-------------------------------------------
A mil-spec capacitive liquid level sensor well-suited for UAV fuel and oil measurement applications. With a 2-bolt fixing and MIL-DTL-38999 connector, this sensor offers plug-and-play installation for defence UAV platforms.

products.name: LSM500-38999
products.descriptor: Mil-spec 5-bolt capacitive fuel level sensor with MIL-DTL-38999 connector for defence UAV, up to 700 mm, IP68

evidence.snippet:
Mil-Spec UAV 5-Bolt Fuel Level Sensor
-------------------------------------
A mil-spec capacitive fuel level sensor with MIL-DTL-38999 connector designed specifically for defence UAV platforms. IP68 rated and custom-built to 700mm long.

products.name: LSM800
products.descriptor: Mil-spec capacitive fuel/oil level sensor with AN-8 threaded mount for defence UAV, up to 450 mm, IP68

evidence.snippet: Mil-spec capacitive liquid level sensor with AN-8 threaded mount, custom-built up to 450mm long.

products.name: LSM1000
products.descriptor: Mil-spec AN-10 threaded capacitive fuel/oil level sensor with integrated PT-1000 temperature sensing, up to 450 mm, IP68

evidence.snippet:
Mil-Spec UAV AN-10 Fuel & Oil Level Sensor
------------------------------------------
A lightweight, mil-spec fuel and oil level sensor designed for defence UAV platforms with integrated temperature sensing. With an AN-10 threaded mount and ingress protection rating of IP68, this mil-spec instrument is custom-built up to 450mm long.

products.name: Quantum 360 (Single Output) TMR Rotary Position Sensor
products.descriptor: Non-contact 360° TMR rotary position sensor, 12-bit resolution, IP67 submersible, single output

evidence.snippet:
Quantum 360 (Single Output) TMR Rotary Position Sensor
======================================================
Quantum 360 (Single Output) TMR Rotary Position Sensor
======================================================
The 360º TMR Rotary Position Sensor is designed to provide industry-leading accuracy and reliability in harsh environment applications, with the ability to detect through large sections of non-ferrous material.

products.name: Quantum 360 (Dual Redundant) Rotary Non-Contact Position Sensor
products.descriptor: Dual-redundant non-contact 360° TMR rotary position sensor, 12-bit resolution, IP67 submersible

evidence.snippet:
Quantum 360 (Dual Redundant) Rotary Non-Contact Position Sensor
===============================================================
Quantum 360 (Dual Redundant) Rotary Non-Contact Position Sensor
===============================================================
The 360º TMR Non-Contact Rotary Position Sensor is designed to provide industry-leading accuracy and reliability in harsh environment applications, with the ability to detect through large sections of non-ferrous material.

products.name: Mil-Spec 0-400 Bar CAN Pressure Sensor
products.descriptor: Mil-spec 0–400 bar CAN pressure transducer with MIL-DTL-38999 connector and 1 kHz response rate

evidence.snippet: A mil-spec CAN pressure sensor with built in transmitter designed to measure pressure across a 0-400 bar (0-6000 psi) pressure measurement. With stainless steel construction, high temperature tolerance and a MIL-DTL-38999 connector this pressure sensor is an ideal drop-in solution for military vehicles.

products.name: LSMR500
products.descriptor: Mil-spec resistive fuel/coolant/water level sensor for heavy-duty military ground vehicles, IP69K, 5-bolt mount

evidence.snippet:
Mil-Spec Ground Vehicle 5-Bolt Resistive Fuel Level Sensor
----------------------------------------------------------
Ultra-rugged, resistive fuel level sensor engineered for heavy-duty military ground vehicles. A robust IP69K rated instrument that is an ideal drop-in replacement for end-of-life (EOL) sensors ensuring a seamless retrofit solution for military vehicles undergoing mid-life upgrade cycles.

products.name: LSM400-CUSTOM
products.descriptor: Mil-spec 4-bolt capacitive transmission oil level sensor for military ground vehicles, stainless steel, IP69K

evidence.snippet:
Mil-Spec Ground Vehicle Transmission Oil Level Sensor
-----------------------------------------------------
A rugged capacitive oil level sensor specifically designed for military ground vehicle transmission oil measurement. Built in stainless steel, the robust sensor is highly-vibration and shock tolerant and available in custom sizes up to 700mm long.

products.name: LSM600-HEAVY
products.descriptor: Mil-spec 6-bolt heavy-duty capacitive oil/fuel level sensor for military ground vehicles, IP69K, ±0.5% accuracy

evidence.snippet:
Mil-Spec Heavy-Duty 6-Bolt Oil and Fuel Level Sensor
----------------------------------------------------
Ultra-rugged, solid-state capacitive oil and fuel level sensor engineered for heavy-duty military vehicles. A robust IP69K rated instrument that delivers reliable measurement consistently in high vibration environments.

products.name: LS100
products.descriptor: Solid-state capacitive liquid level sensor with 1-bolt fixing, up to 450 mm, fuel/oil/coolant/water compatible

evidence.snippet: Advanced capacitive liquid level sensor with a simple 1-bolt fixing, custom-built up to 450mm long.

products.name: Quantum TMR 45mm Linear Motorsport Wheel Gun Position Sensor
products.descriptor: TMR linear position sensor with 45 mm sensing range for motorsport wheel gun central nut fitment verification, IP67

evidence.snippet: A solid-state, precision motorsport wheel gun position sensor designed to measure a 45mm linear reprogrammable sensing range for secure central wheel nut fitment.

unresolved_questions: No NDAA Section 848/889 or Blue UAS compliance language found on any product page or fetched compliance pages; all 15 products marked unknown for both fields.
The Mil-Spec 0-400 Bar CAN Pressure Sensor page notes MIL-STD 461 and MIL-STD 810G compliance but no NDAA claim.
LSM600-HEAVY name on the triage list matches the fetched page (resource-0018) exactly; vendor-pass listed it as 'LSM600 Heavy' — canonical product name is LSM600-HEAVY per the product page heading.
